Title: Create a new price list
Preconditions: Admin logged in to Backend
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to {{BACK_URL}} Pricing module > Price Lists
[ACT] Click 'Add' button
[ACT] Enter price list name
[ACT] Select currency USD
[ACT] Click 'Create' button
Assertions:
[STATE] New price list is created and visible in list
[DOM] Price list name appears in Price Lists table
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[ADMIN] Verify price list persists after page refresh
[API] GET /api/pricing/pricelists — confirm new entry exists
Failure_Signals: Price list not created; 'Create' button unresponsive; name not reflected in list
Cleanup: delete created price list via Admin

Title: Add prices to the product
Preconditions:
Admin logged in to Backend
Price list created [PRICE-001]

[ACT] Click 'Save'

[ACT] Click 'Save'
[ASSERT] Verify Price range shows both list and sale price
[ACT] Re-open product; click 'Add price row'

[ASSERT] Verify tier price row saved

[STATE] Step 1: List price saved; product Price range column shows $100.00
[STATE] Step 2: Price range shows list price ($100) and sale price ($80)

[API] GET /api/pricing/pricelists/{id}/prices — confirm all three price entries
[CONSOLE] No JS errors during save operations
Failure_Signals: Save fails silently; price range column not updated; tier price row not persisting

Title: Pricelist > Validate description field length
Preconditions:

API access available

[ACT] Send request
[ASSERT] Verify error response

[STATE] HTTP 400 or 422 error response received

[API] Confirm error response body matches expected validation message exactly
